requirements_met: Baseline captured before each task invocation (both task-work and direct paths)
Git-detected file counts reflect only per-task changes, not cumulative feature changes
_create_synthetic_direct_mode_report uses delta instead of raw git state
First task in worktree still reports correct file counts
Unit tests verify delta computation with mock git state
Logging shows baseline vs delta counts for observability
validation_results.code_quality: High; logic is encapsulated in the invoker and verified by targeted unit tests.
edge_cases_covered: New files created during task execution
Files modified that were already modified in baseline

criteria_verification.notes: Baseline state is captured in invoke_player() before both execution paths.
Delta computation (current - baseline) is applied to both modified and created file sets.
Confirmed that _create_player_report_from_task_work uses the computed delta.
Confirmed that _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report uses the computed delta.
Verified via test_first_task_reports_full_diff that empty baselines return the full current state.
10 unit tests passed, covering all delta computation scenarios.
Logger.info calls added to report the baseline and delta counts.

rationale: The implementation fully satisfies all acceptance criteria and is verified by a passing suite of unit tests.
